On this page

Appendix A — Name Tables ​

Organized by nation. Each table gives names players and GMs can use directly, or treat as phonological models for constructing new ones. Where naming conventions have two registers (northern/southern, conservative/commercial), both are given.

BELLARIA ​

Northern Bellaria — First Names

MaleFemale
TabanSura
OrunNarai
ArslanKhulan
BekhorArga
TeivaBorte
JulaUulen
SürchTeya
NominAltan

Northern Bellaria — Clan Surnames (spoken before the personal name in formal address)

Jarchin · Belgüt · Khökh · Mergid · Khasar · Sübei · Argun · Nökhör

Southern/Coastal Bellaria — First Names

MaleFemale
AldricSigrun
KonradHilde
BrandtLiesa
VornBrenna
ErwinWren
HaasUlla

Southern Bellaria — Family Names

Kesler · Vornwald · Brauer · Holtz · Grimhaus · Aldsberg · Recker · Fendt

VAL CADMA ​

Birth Names — Personal

MaleFemale
WilhelmEvelyn
MoritzLiesel
HeinrichIngrid
FranzBritta
ErhardMathilde
BertrandSigrid
AldricHanna
KonradPetra

Birth Names — Family

Kranzler · Abelsberg · Vornwald · Hessler · Grimhaus · Falkenrath · Brenner · Wulfsberg

Devotional Names (taken at ordination; used in all Church contexts)

Root conceptMale formFemale form
PurityPuritarPuritara
FaithFidmarFidmara
VigilanceVigilarVigilara
OrderOrdenisOrdenisa
LightLuxianLuxiana
ClarityClaritharClarithara
Burning faithArdentisArdentisa
TruthVeritharVerithara
SilenceSilentisSilentisa

Pontifical Names (taken at Archbishop elevation; drawn from martyred Church figures)

Andros · Luciar · Marevantis · Severan · Kalanthis · Benedar · Vordanis

NORDERENN ​

Old Norderenn — First Names (used openly in the north; used privately in the occupied south)

MaleFemale
DragosMira
BorisVesna
MiranZorka
SlavkoNada
RankoBrana
VelkoRada
DobrinSveta
BrankoLjuba

Old Norderenn — Patronymic Surnames

Ivanich · Voronin · Selkov · Draganov · Milanich · Borisov · Stojanich · Velkov

SOLARA ​

General Population — First Names

MaleFemale
TariqLuisa
IdrisAlmira
CorvilanEnara
SeffanYara
EmirhanMireia
AlvarAmaia
NadirSolène
KarimIlara

General Population — Family Names

Montara · Errebal · Alcain · Durrain · Solevar · Ferris · Mendavar · Corrial

Messalyan-Origin Family Names (the great families and those of similar origin)

Oluwafemi · Diop · Diallo · Kouyaté · Traoré · Coulibaly · Keïta

MESSALYA ​

First Names

MaleFemale
FaridNassira
IbouYusra
Amon-DrakAissata
BassimFatou
ToundeKaira
KenuKoumba
YusufLamine
OumarNafi

Stone Raiders — Names and Epithets

Skarn · Raka · Vel · Doru · Khet · Bran · Sule · Gara

Epithets added to single-name Raiders: Two-Palms · Dusthands · Crystaleye · Deepmark · Splitrock · Sandwatch

ALVENGAARD — AELÁR ​

First Names

MaleFemale
VaenithMiral
CelarelLiriel
IthavarCalindra
EndrianSylvara
LorienNaeveth
SilvarElowen
AerindelCaladwen
CorvindelMiravel

Lineage Names (rarely used outside formal context)

Starweave · Silvermark · Goldthread · Dawnmantle · Moonveil · Brightloom · Calmwater · Deepgreen

ALVENGAARD — HÚLDAR ​

First Names

MaleFemale
BrekkMira
OrunSela
AldisVeth
ThornBrin
MordWyn
FenKael
GraelDess

Nature Surnames (druidic bond markers; not shared with strangers by default)

Ashfall · Stonestep · Greenwinter · Coldbrook · Ironroot · Mudspring · Barkcrown · Deepfrost · Windbreak · Heatherstone · Boulderwatch · Willowscar · Saltfen · Gravelmoss

ENDORAS — DUERGAR ​

Names (clan prefix, then personal — apostrophe marks the division)

Khor'Balin · Dur'Grim · Nar'Threk · Belm'Vard · Trun'Keth · Galt'Morn · Dur'Brak · Nar'Helm · Breld'Vor · Keth'Nal

ENDORAS — DUARDEEN ​

Names (personal name, then softened clan-surname)

Balin Khorwald · Grim Durven · Threk Narhold · Vard Belmin · Keth Trundal · Morn Galtbek · Brak Durfen · Helm Narveld

URGÔNIA ​

First Names

MaleFemale
KragUrsa
DorinBela
VeskTamis
BekSura
TravMera
OlinKosta

Clan Craft Epithets (follow the first name; describe the clan's hereditary specialization)

Stoneshaper · Bridgemaker · Swiftcurrent · Quarryvoice · Ironbrace · Millwright · Salttrader · Ropemaker · Deepcutter · Waterwright · Claybender · Grainreader

Personal Epithets (used by clanless Ûrgons; replace clan epithet)

Structure: [Name] the [descriptor], or [Name] [verb-noun]

Examples: Vesk Bonecutter · Krag the Twice-Exiled · Bela of the River Road · Olin Emptyhanded

GWAN'TOR — BADAKI ​

First Names

MaleFemale
KhavraSura
BahuMira
DoruKeth
VeshBeln
OluKhesta
KhetSuri

Earned Epithets (awarded by clan elders after a notable act)

Ironwall · Laughing-Death · Three-Cuts · the Unmoved · Longstride · Silentblade · Stonebreaker · Twice-Named · Brighthand · the Patient · Bonecrown · Ashmark · Coldtongue · the Unbroken

A Badaki character with no epithet yet is introduced by first name only.

BAL'MEKH — VARTRAN ​

Single Names Only

Vryndakth · Kzaravel · Brakthnyr · Szvolkryn · Threkval · Dyzomnar · Kzevrath · Vrakhnal · Szulbrek · Thordvyn · Kzavleth · Vrandakh · Brekthnar · Szkolvyn · Drakhneth · Vrelmasz

A Vartran NPC who has not given their name is not an error in the text — the scene is working correctly.

VAL'ARIA — NORTHERN ​

First Names

MaleFemale
FelorinVella
OndathilLireth
SilvanderOndara
CorvindelSilvael
MiralMirwen
ElhavarCalindra

Family Names (reference vessels or features in the Ancestors' Fields records)

Tidewalker · Stillwater · Longkeel · Deepanchor · Calmpoint · Ironmast · Greypassage · Coldmooring

VAL'ARIA — SOUTHERN ​

First Names

MaleFemale
BelloSira
TomlinUnda
CorvinNessa
WarrickBrinny
FinlanMalla
OswinDella

Family Names (port-of-origin or trade-based)

Harbormere · Saltmast · Portsmith · Goodcurrent · Clearwake · Fairankle · Tidemark · Wharfson
